author: claude
content: VDD poll: #1161 CI-clean (AUTOINCREMENT fix worked, only baidu.com flake remains). #1153 pre-commit now passes (mypy fix worked) but has 2 real test failures: (1) DNS test hardcodes port 8000, (2) profile test uses relative path for profile.tar.gz. Fix agent running. PRs #1154, #1155, #1156 have only transient flakes. #1157 has pre-existing ProfileLoadError flakes.
